program_title: Comprehensive Verification Program: unit tests, end-to-end scripts, and detailed diagnostics logging

requirements.title: Comprehensive Verification Program: unit tests, end-to-end scripts, and detailed diagnostics logging
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Every major runtime surface and workflow is covered by deterministic unit tests and end-to-end scripts with structured logs, and evidence is consumable in CI and local workflows.

unit_tests.justification: Core host tools conformance and behavior checks.
Hardened tool execution tests for real filesystem/process edge cases and diagnostics fidelity.
Extension runtime scenario verification.
12 regression gate tests validating pass-rate thresholds, N/A limits, exception policy, and verdict generation.
Validates end-to-end agent loop behavior through realistic integration turns.
Covers CLI-level interactive and non-interactive end-to-end execution flows.
Checks cross-provider behavioral parity across the end-to-end integration surface.
Exercises session/message orchestration controls in end-to-end workflows.
Verifies provider streaming behavior in full end-to-end execution paths.
Ensures RPC mode and transport semantics hold under end-to-end test conditions.
Validates end-to-end session persistence, resume, and state continuity behavior.
Runs end-to-end tool invocation and result handling across representative tool paths.
Covers terminal UI interaction loops and rendering-relevant end-to-end behavior.
Validates preflight workflow expectations before end-to-end runtime execution.
Exercises deterministic multi-agent flight-recorder replay with real sessions, tools, extension hooks, and redacted JSONL/report artifacts.
Schema-level bench artifact shape checks for deterministic diagnostics output.
Model-scoped capability policy resolution and precedence verification.
Scoped capability policy enforcement checks across nested policy contexts.
Session compaction correctness coverage for history truncation and continuity.
Regression guard for previously observed compaction edge-case failures.
Configuration precedence behavior across defaults, env, project, and CLI layers.
Error typing and conversion-path behavior checks for stable diagnostics.
Extension scoring logic and ranking stability under deterministic inputs.
Mock spec schema invariants and validation behavior coverage.
End-to-end mock spec validation and failure-path diagnostics checks.
Model selector cycling behavior across available model inventories.
Model/message serialization round-trip correctness and edge-case handling.
Performance budget policy enforcement for regression detection.
Performance comparison harness behavior and report integrity checks.
Scheduler reproducer coverage for deterministic ordering and race regression guards.
Security budget threshold enforcement and evidence emission checks.
Session contract conformance for persistence, structure, and replay behavior.
Agent-loop behavior verification against recorded VCR fixtures.
Agent-loop interruption/retry/resume reliability scenarios with timeline artifact coverage.
OAuth refresh-path behavior and token lifecycle checks using deterministic VCR traces.
HTTP client request/response behavior and transport-level diagnostics coverage.
CLI command/model selection behavior and argument-routing correctness.
Model registry loading, lookup, and selection behavior under realistic fixtures.
Provider construction and backend-selection invariants across configured providers.
Streaming provider behavior and event-shape stability across runtimes.
Resource loading and path-resolution correctness for runtime dependency inputs.
RPC mode lifecycle and execution-path correctness checks.
RPC protocol message contract validation and compatibility checks.
Session-connector behavior in RPC flows and state-carrying interactions.
Conformance coverage for session connector semantics and invariants.
Session index creation, lookup, and persistence consistency checks.
Session picker behavior, ordering, and selection edge-case coverage.
SQLite-backed session persistence and retrieval correctness checks.
Strict Server-Sent Events parsing and protocol compliance verification.
Streaming hostcall handling and event-forwarding correctness checks.
Regression reproducer for SSE flush-boundary handling stability.
Regression reproducer for newline-sensitive SSE parsing behavior.
Capability prompt construction and policy text shaping coverage.
Conformance report comparator diff logic and verdict behavior checks.
Conformance harness behavior under deterministic mock-style fixture conditions.
Event-dispatch latency measurement and regression threshold checks.
Extension benchmark harness orchestration and result-shape validation.
Primary extension conformance integration verification across corpus fixtures.
Generated extension conformance cases and fixture integration checks.
Conformance guardrail enforcement for required report and pass-rate invariants.
Negative-path conformance behavior and failure-surface verification.
Conformance selector filtering and suite-target routing checks.
Conformance output schema/shape stability checks for report consumers.
Extension entry scanning and discovery behavior verification.
Extension inclusion-list policy and allowlist selection coverage.
Extension load-time benchmark execution and budget assertions.
Extension preflight analysis diagnostics and classification checks.
Property-based extension runtime invariants and robustness coverage.
Extension provenance verification and policy conformance checks.
Randomized extension trial harness behavior and reproducibility checks.
Extension risk-review artifact generation and rule coverage.
Extension code-search indexing/query behavior correctness checks.
Extension license scanning and compliance classification coverage.
Tiered extension corpus loading/selection behavior validation.
Extension validation pipeline checks for schema and runtime constraints.
Concurrent extension execution correctness and race-regression coverage.
Extension event cancellation semantics and propagation behavior checks.
Extension event registration/dispatch wiring correctness checks.
Filesystem shim behavior consistency and sandbox semantics coverage.
Extension manifest parsing/validation and metadata handling checks.
Message/session extension integration behavior and state handoff checks.
Process shim runtime behavior and compatibility checks for extensions.
Extension provider OAuth flow integration and failure-path coverage.
URL shim behavior compatibility and normalization checks.
Interactive extension UI flow behavior and render-state checks.
Lab runtime extension integration behavior under deterministic runtime controls.
Node child_process shim API behavior and sandbox handling checks.
Node events shim semantics and emitter behavior compatibility coverage.
Node fs shim path and file-operation compatibility checks.
Cross-shim integration behavior across Node compatibility surfaces.
Package-manager integration behavior and command contract checks.
Performance benchmark harness orchestration and artifact contract checks.
Pi connector shim behavior and bridge compatibility checks.
Config-error reproducer regression coverage for known failure modes.
Edit encoding reproducer regression coverage for text-encoding edge cases.
Regression placeholder for truncation reproduction coverage tracked in traceability governance.
BOM-related regression reproducer for file parsing/editing behavior.
Whitespace edit reproducer regression checks for patch/edit stability.
Governance gate ensuring matrix/classification/file-set staleness stays bounded.
TUI snapshot stability checks for interactive rendering behavior.

evidence_logs.justification: Structured E2E run logs and artifact index output.
Conformance and scenario reports published by CI.
Machine-readable inventory linking high-value suites to schema-tagged JSON/JSONL artifacts for traceability repair.

requirements.title: Resource, scheduler, and cargo headroom admission replay coverage
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Resource loading, scheduler ordering, cargo headroom admission, and their replay artifacts are mapped to deterministic tests and machine-readable evidence.

unit_tests.justification: Covers skill, prompt template, theme, and extension resource path loading, precedence, collisions, and diagnostics through realistic package-manager resolution inputs.
Covers missing resource paths, no-default loading, explicit resource roots, prompt/theme dedupe, and loader edge cases for src/resources.rs.
Deterministic scheduler replay for timer/event ordering and observable seq invariants in src/scheduler.rs.
Fixture-backed replay matrix for scripts/cargo_headroom.sh admission decisions, RCH queue forecasts, target/tmp remediation, and fail-closed local fallback behavior.
Guards RCH artifact-sync preflight so required nested test artifacts are not hidden by .rchignore rules before remote execution.

e2e_scripts.justification: Runtime admission wrapper exercised by the cargo_headroom_admission fixture replay suite.
Swarm smoke harness records RCH admission/degraded decisions as redacted structured evidence for replayable resource-admission diagnostics.

evidence_logs.justification: Machine-readable resource_scheduler_admission lane links suites, replay command, schema tags, and artifact refs.
Deterministic admission fixture matrix for RCH availability, queue pressure, saturation, stale snapshots, malformed JSON, and local fallback decisions.
Structured resource edge-case replay logs emitted by governed test runs.
Structured cargo headroom admission replay logs emitted by governed test runs.

requirements.title: Traceability matrix linking requirements to unit tests, e2e scripts, and evidence logs
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Matrix is committed, machine-readable, and used by CI checks to detect uncovered requirements.

unit_tests.justification: Fixture-driven tests validate matrix-linked behavior categories.

e2e_scripts.justification: Primary E2E entrypoint referenced by matrix entries.

evidence_logs.justification: CI artifacts proving runtime coverage.
Traceability governance input proving high-value suite artifact coverage is machine-readable.

requirements.title: Harness unit-test expansion for normalization, dispatch, and determinism
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Harness unit suite covers all known failure classes with detailed assertion messages and structured test logs.

unit_tests.justification: Deterministic event-loop behavior and ordering checks.
Dispatch ordering and deterministic runtime behavior.
Fixture normalization and schema-level validation.

e2e_scripts.justification: Runs harness-sensitive suites through reproducible command flow.

evidence_logs.justification: Harness scenario execution traces and diagnostics.

requirements.title: Runtime compatibility unit-test matrix for Node and Bun API surfaces

Crypto API behavior coverage.

e2e_scripts.justification: Executes compatibility-sensitive integration suites.

evidence_logs.justification: Matrix and parity result payloads.

requirements.title: Capability policy unit tests for precedence, toggles, and scoped enforcement

Capability-denial matrix checks for safety controls.
HTTP policy-level guard coverage.

e2e_scripts.justification: End-to-end policy behavior under interactive and non-interactive flows.

evidence_logs.justification: Policy negative test reports and event traces.

requirements.title: End-to-end extension corpus test suite across capability profiles
requirements.acceptance_criteria: E2E results include per-profile pass rates, blocked-operation summaries, detailed structured logs, and preflight-to-runtime consistency checks suitable for root-cause analysis.

Corpus-wide auto-repair end-to-end verification and report generation.

requirements.title: Golden-path first-time-user e2e suite (install -> configure -> run -> recover)
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Complete onboarding journey is proven end-to-end: version/help, config, doctor (all formats), policy escalation, fix-and-recheck, and full user journey simulation.

requirements.title: SEC-TRACK: Deterministic Extension Security Program
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Every SEC implementation bead has at least one mapped unit test target, deterministic behavior claims are backed by fixed-fixture tests, and matrix updates are required when behavior changes.
